title: MendingReworked
description: Reworked the Mending mechanic to behave differently while keeping a vanilla-like feel
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0d1b0c0f7647c051d73f90c91d30e470cfb5a6bb.png)

**Mending Reworked** is a mod that reimagines the way the **Mending** enchantment works, while keeping a vanilla-like experience:

- **Mending is now obtainable from the enchanting table**
- **Items with Mending no longer repair themselves with experience orbs**
- **Instead, you can repair them at an anvil using a specific material, for a flat cost of 1 experience level per repair**
    
**Repair materials by item type:**
    
  - **Tridents** → repaired using **Prismarine** 
  - **Bows** → repaired using **String**
        

This system makes repairing more immersive and resource-based, while keeping Mending useful in a balanced, intuitive way
